title: Fantastically Crisp German Garlic Skillet
description: A nutty and crisp German dish featuring garlic bulb and lardons, perfect for a high-protein meal. This show-off skillet is sure to impress your guests.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the lardons over medium heat until crispy, then set aside.
In the same skillet, add the vegetable oil and cook the chicken breast until browned, then set aside with the lardons.
Add the sliced onions to the skillet and cook until they are translucent and starting to caramelize.
Add the sliced potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the garlic cloves to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the cooked chicken and lardons to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes, or until the potatoes are crispy and golden brown.
